info.title: CodeScene Public API
info.description: CodeScene Public API provides access to project information, analyses, delta analyses, code health metrics, developer settings, teams, and code coverage data.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of projects with optional sorting and filtering.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number to return. Default is 1.

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Field to sort projects by in descending order.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of field names to return.

post.description: Create a new project with configuration.

get.description: Retrieve details of a single project.

delete.description: Delete a project by ID, including analyses and associated developer settings.

parameters.name: developer-settings
parameters.description: Whether to also delete associated developer settings. Default true.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

parameters.name: refactoring_targets
parameters.description: Set to true to get technical debt hotspots.

post.description: Trigger an analysis for the project.

parameters.name: repo-url
parameters.description: Git repository URL to filter coverage data.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date (yyyy-MM-dd). Defaults to previous month.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date (yyyy-MM-dd). Defaults to current date.

BearerAuth.description: Bearer token authentication. Create an API token in CodeScene UI.
